module_summary: This module tests the custom documentation UI for a FastAPI application using pytest. It sets up a static directory, starts a TestClient for the app, and verifies that Swagger UI and Redoc are accessible at /docs and /redoc respectively. The test_swagger_ui_html function checks if the Swagger UI is correctly loaded with necessary scripts and stylesheets. The test_swagger_ui_oauth2_redirect_html function ensures that the OAuth2 redirect works as expected. The test_redoc_html function verifies that Redoc is accessible and includes the correct script for rendering. The test_api function tests a GET request to /users/john, expecting a 200 status code with the message "Hello john". This module fits into the project by providing integration tests for the custom documentation UI endpoints of the FastAPI application.

functions.name: client
functions.summary: Initializes a static directory and sets up a TestClient for the application, yielding it to tests, then removes the static directory.

functions.name: test_swagger_ui_html
functions.summary: Tests the Swagger UI HTML endpoint by making a GET request and asserting the response status code and content.

functions.name: test_swagger_ui_oauth2_redirect_html
functions.summary: Tests the OAuth2 redirect endpoint by making a GET request and asserting the response status code and content.

functions.name: test_redoc_html
functions.summary: Tests the Redoc HTML endpoint by making a GET request and asserting the response status code and content.

functions.name: test_api
functions.summary: Tests an API endpoint by making a GET request and asserting the response status code, JSON structure, and message.
